# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Debug CI/CD (Verbose)

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: "Target environment name (e.g., production, staging)"
        required: true
        default: "production"
      deploy_url:
        description: "Deployment API endpoint URL"
        required: false
        default: ""
      healthcheck_url:
        description: "Healthcheck URL"
        required: false
        default: ""
      log_sensitive:
        description: "DANGEROUS: If true, will print secrets (tokens, connection strings) to logs."
        required: true
        default: "false"

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: debug-cicd-${{ github.ref }}-${{ inputs.environment }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  debug:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: ${{ inputs.environment }}
    timeout-minutes: 60

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: System & Runner Info
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          uname -a
          cat /etc/os-release || true
          id
          pwd
          ls -la
          df -h
          free -h || true
          env | sort

      - name: GitHub Context (JSON)
        shell: bash
        env:
          GITHUB_CONTEXT: ${{ toJson(github) }}
          RUNNER_CONTEXT: ${{ toJson(runner) }}
          JOB_CONTEXT: ${{ toJson(job) }}
          STRATEGY_CONTEXT: ${{ toJson(strategy) }}
          MATRIX_CONTEXT: ${{ toJson(matrix) }}
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "GITHUB_CONTEXT=$GITHUB_CONTEXT"
          echo "RUNNER_CONTEXT=$RUNNER_CONTEXT"
          echo "JOB_CONTEXT=$JOB_CONTEXT"
          echo "STRATEGY_CONTEXT=$STRATEGY_CONTEXT"
          echo "MATRIX_CONTEXT=$MATRIX_CONTEXT"

      - name: Tooling Versions
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          git --version
          bash --version
          curl --version
          openssl version
          python3 --version || true
          node --version || true
          npm --version || true
          docker --version || true
          docker info || true

      - name: Build (example placeholder)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "No build configured. Add your build commands here."
          ls -la

      - name: Deployment Details (SAFE - no secrets)
        shell: bash
        env:
          DEPLOY_URL: ${{ inputs.deploy_url }}
          HEALTHCHECK_URL: ${{ inputs.healthcheck_url }}
          ENVIRONMENT: ${{ inputs.environment }}
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "ENVIRONMENT=$ENVIRONMENT"
          echo "DEPLOY_URL=$DEPLOY_URL"
          echo "HEALTHCHECK_URL=$HEALTHCHECK_URL"
          echo "GITHUB_SHA=${GITHUB_SHA}"
          echo "GITHUB_REF=${GITHUB_REF}"
          echo "GITHUB_REPOSITORY=${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}"
          echo "GITHUB_RUN_ID=${GITHUB_RUN_ID}"
          echo "GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER=${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}"
          echo "GITHUB_WORKFLOW=${GITHUB_WORKFLOW}"
          echo "GITHUB_ACTOR=${GITHUB_ACTOR}"

      - name: Call Deployment API (SAFE - redacted)
        if: ${{ inputs.deploy_url != '' }}
        shell: bash
        env:
          DEPLOY_URL: ${{ inputs.deploy_url }}
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "Calling deployment endpoint: $DEPLOY_URL"
          RESPONSE_FILE="$(mktemp)"
          HEADERS_FILE="$(mktemp)"
          STATUS="$(curl -sS -D "$HEADERS_FILE" -o "$RESPONSE_FILE" -w "%{http_code}" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            --data "{\"sha\":\"${GITHUB_SHA}\",\"ref\":\"${GITHUB_REF}\",\"run_id\":\"${GITHUB_RUN_ID}\"}" \
            "$DEPLOY_URL" || true)"
          echo "HTTP_STATUS=$STATUS"
          echo "RESPONSE_HEADERS:"
          sed -E 's/(authorization:).*/\1 [REDACTED]/Ig; s/(x-api-key:).*/\1 [REDACTED]/Ig; s/(set-cookie:).*/\1 [REDACTED]/Ig' "$HEADERS_FILE" || true
          echo "RESPONSE_BODY:"
          cat "$RESPONSE_FILE" || true

      - name: Healthcheck (SAFE)
        if: ${{ inputs.healthcheck_url != '' }}
        shell: bash
        env:
          HEALTHCHECK_URL: ${{ inputs.healthcheck_url }}
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "Checking: $HEALTHCHECK_URL"
          RESPONSE_FILE="$(mktemp)"
          HEADERS_FILE="$(mktemp)"
          STATUS="$(curl -sS -D "$HEADERS_FILE" -o "$RESPONSE_FILE" -w "%{http_code}" "$HEALTHCHECK_URL" || true)"
          echo "HTTP_STATUS=$STATUS"
          echo "RESPONSE_HEADERS:"
          sed -E 's/(authorization:).*/\1 [REDACTED]/Ig; s/(set-cookie:).*/\1 [REDACTED]/Ig' "$HEADERS_FILE" || true
          echo "RESPONSE_BODY:"
          cat "$RESPONSE_FILE" || true

      - name: DANGEROUS: Print ALL env + secrets (explicit opt-in)
        if: ${{ inputs.log_sensitive == 'true' }}
        shell: bash
        env:
          ALL_CONTEXT: ${{ toJson(secrets) }}
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "WARNING: Sensitive logging enabled. Secrets may be exposed in logs."
          echo "=== ENV (FULL) ==="
          env
          echo "=== SECRETS CONTEXT (FULL) ==="
          echo "$ALL_CONTEXT"
          echo "=== COMMON CONNECTION STRINGS (if present) ==="
          echo "DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL-}"
          echo "DB_CONNECTION_STRING=${DB_CONNECTION_STRING-}"
          echo "REDIS_URL=${REDIS_URL-}"
          echo "MONGO_URL=${MONGO_URL-}"
          echo "AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING=${AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING-}"
          echo "AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID-}"
          echo "AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY-}"
          echo "GCP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT=${GCP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT-}"
          echo "API_KEY=${API_KEY-}"
          echo "TOKEN=${TOKEN-}"
          echo "AUTHORIZATION=${AUTHORIZATION-}"

      - name: Always: Upload debug artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: debug-artifacts-${{ github.run_id }}
          if-no-files-found: ignore
          path: |
            .github
            **/*.log
            **/test-results/**
            **/reports/**
            **/coverage/**
            **/junit.xml
            **/surefire-reports/**
            **/playwright-report/**
            **/cypress/videos/**
            **/cypress/screenshots/**

      - name: Always: Final status dump
        if: always()
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "Job completed at: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")"
          echo "Conclusion: ${{ job.status }}"
